projectDescription: An AI agent skill that searches Reddit, X, YouTube, Hacker News, Polymarket, TikTok, and the web in parallel — then synthesizes what people are actually saying about any topic in the last 30 days.
keyFeatures: Multi-source parallel search across Reddit, X/Twitter, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Hacker News, Polymarket, GitHub, Bluesky, and the web
Engagement-scored ranking — upvotes, likes, and real-money Polymarket odds outrank editorial content
Intelligent pre-research: resolves X handles, subreddits, TikTok hashtags, and GitHub repos before searching
Cross-source cluster merging — same story from Reddit + X + YouTube becomes one entry, not three
Full YouTube transcripts and top Reddit comments with upvote counts
Zero-config quick start: Reddit, Hacker News, Polymarket, and GitHub work with no API keys
Person-mode and project-mode GitHub search (PR velocity, star counts, release notes)
ELI5 mode, Best Takes humor scoring, and comparison mode for X vs Y queries
Installable on Claude Code, OpenClaw (clawhub), Gemini CLI, and claude.ai web via .skill file
publicApiSurface: --plan '<JSON>' (external query plan, skips internal LLM planner)
--auto-resolve (engine-side handle/subreddit discovery for platforms without WebSearch)
